description: The Moroccan mafia is a collection of criminal organizations primarily composed of people of Moroccan descent, specializing in trafficking large quantities of cocaine and synthetic drugs through Spain, Portugal, the Netherlands, and Belgium for distribution across Europe. Active since the 1990s, these networks have privileged relationships with Colombian and Mexican cartels and are involved in drug trafficking, money laundering, and other crimes. The group gained notoriety during the Mocro-War, a gang war that began in 2012 after a cocaine shipment theft in Antwerp.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Mixers are seen by Belgian politicians as one of the most dangerous Belgian drug networks in the country... The El Ballouti clan is based in Antwerp, Belgium... The Fish Farmers clan... established themselves as main contributors within the international cocaine trade... the Belgian authorities dismantled the Belgian-Moroccan Banana gang
country_links.context: The Mixers, El Ballouti clan, Fish Farmers clan, and Banana gang are active in Belgium, operating in Antwerp and other areas.

country_links.evidence_quote: Presence also in Morocco , Spain , Italy , France , United Kingdom , Germany , Romania , United Arab Emirates , Colombia , Brazil , Dominican Republic , Panama and Suriname .
country_links.context: The organization has a presence in Brazil.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 19 April 2016, the Canadian authorities intervened a hosting company with the aim of decrypting the Dutch telecommunication servers of Ennetcom.
country_links.context: The Moroccan mafia's encrypted communications were decrypted by Canadian authorities, indicating the organization's use of Canadian-based servers.

country_links.evidence_quote: it also exposed a very close and personal friendship between Ridouan Taghi, and Chilean cartel boss Rico 'El Rico' Eduardo Riquelme Vega, who was arrested in Santiago, Chile in 2017.
country_links.context: A Chilean cartel boss allied with Ridouan Taghi was arrested in Chile, indicating the Moroccan mafia's connection to Chile.

country_links.evidence_quote: Razzouki belonged to a European criminal organisation of the Moroccan Mafia and was at the head of a group of traffickers from the Clan del Golfo cartel who were involved in the international export of cocaine, especially to Spain and Portugal.
country_links.context: The Moroccan mafia's member Razzouki led a group of traffickers from the Clan del Golfo cartel involved in cocaine export.

country_links.evidence_quote: Presence also in Morocco , Spain , Italy , France , United Kingdom , Germany , Romania , United Arab Emirates , Colombia , Brazil , Dominican Republic , Panama and Suriname .
country_links.context: The organization has a presence in the Dominican Republic.

country_links.evidence_quote: The drugs were hidden in two containers of bananas from Colombia that had passed through Ecuador
country_links.context: The Banana gang's cocaine shipment passed through Ecuador.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Iranian government allegedly protected Taghi as he worked together with the Iranian secret service, to assassinate enemies of the Iranian state who were hiding out on European soil.
country_links.context: The Iranian government allegedly protected Taghi as he worked with the Iranian secret service to assassinate enemies on European soil.

country_links.evidence_quote: Naoufal allied himself with the Taghi organisation, the Irish Mob and some members of the Martha organisation... It was also in an apartment of the Irish Kinahan clan where Naoufal was eventually arrested by the special forces of Dublin.
country_links.context: The Noffel clan allied with the Irish Mob and the Kinahan clan, and Naoufal was arrested in Dublin.

country_links.context: The organization has a presence in Italy.

country_links.context: The organization has privileged relationships with Mexican cartels.

country_links.evidence_quote: one of the Mixers was spotted in Tangier... The Moroccan police intercepted € 10.2 million in cash in a €400,000 apartment in Tangier, alongside a villa in Berkane... the Fish Farmers were amongst the main owners of a luxury suite in the Hilton hotel near the Tangier-Ville railway station in Morocco
country_links.context: The Mixers have assets in Tangier, Berkane, and Saïdia; the Fish Farmers own a luxury suite in Tangier; the El Ballouti clan originates from Al Hoceïma.

country_links.evidence_quote: the Dutch government and its intelligence service AIVD claim to have 'strong evidence' that Iran used Dutch-Moroccan gangsters... the gangland-style assassination of Ali Motamed... who had settled in a rowhouse after coming to the Netherlands as a refugee
country_links.context: The Moroccan mafia operates in the Netherlands; Ridouan Taghi was active there; the murder of Ali Motamed occurred in the Netherlands.

country_links.context: The Moroccan mafia imports cocaine from Peru.
